title: P0 critical fix: bootstrap failure on cold start
body:
The agent OS fails to start when the state store is empty.

Acceptance criteria:
- Cold start succeeds without errors
- Default state is initialised correctly

title: P1 feature: add retry logic to GitHub adapter
body:
Network calls in the GitHub adapter have no retry on transient failures.

depends-on: #5

title: P2 refactor: extract queue sorting into a helper
body: Queue sorting logic is inline inside buildQueue. Extract to a named helper function.

title: P3 chore: update README with queue CLI usage
body:
The README does not document the queue helper CLI.

depends-on: #3

title: P1 prerequisite: harden state store initialisation
body: State store must tolerate missing or corrupt files on first run.
